evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                      |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt8([1, 1]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | Null { len: 2 }             |
+--------+-----------------------------+

| Column | Data                                                                                                                             |

ast: mode(x_null)

ast: mode(all_null)

| Column   | Data                                                                            |
